name: Summon Fiend

components.materialDescription: a bloodstone wrapped in a vellum scroll inscribed with infernal sigils worth 600+ GP

placementEligibility.notes: Summon Fiend manifests the Fiendish Spirit in an unoccupied space the caster can see within range.

effects.description: Summon one Fiendish Spirit in a visible unoccupied space within 90 feet for up to 1 hour with concentration, choosing a Demon, Devil, or Yugoloth form. The spirit is an ally, shares your Initiative count but acts immediately after you, obeys verbal commands with no action required, Dodges and avoids danger when uncommanded, disappears at 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends, and uses the slot level for AC, Hit Points, and its form's Bite or Claw attacks.

scaling.customFormula: Use the slot level as the spell's level in the Fiendish Spirit stat block: AC is 12 + spell level, HP is 50 + 15 for each spell level above 6, and the form attack adds the spell's level to its damage.

conditionalEndings.description: The fiendish spirit disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points.

summon.objectDescription: Fiendish Spirit ally that shares the caster's initiative, acts immediately after the caster, obeys verbal commands with no caster action, and uses its form's attack as its combat action.

specialActions.name: Fiendish Attack
specialActions.description: Melee or Ranged spell attack, reach 5 ft. or range 150 ft. Hit: 2d6 + 4 + the spell's level damage of the form's type (Slashing for Demon, Fire for Devil, Poison for Yugoloth), with the form's rider applied.

socialEffect.notes: The summoned Fiendish Spirit is an ally to the caster and allies, understands the caster languages, shares initiative, and follows commands.

aiContext.prompt: Choose the Fiendish Spirit form (Demon, Devil, or Yugoloth) and arrival space; use the caster's spell attack modifier for the form's attack, apply its damage type, and apply the form's rider on a hit.

options.label: Demon
options.summary: Summon a Demon Fiendish Spirit whose Bite deals Slashing damage and frenzies on a kill.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Fiendish Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Devil
options.summary: Summon a Devil Fiendish Spirit whose ranged attack deals Fire damage.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Fiendish Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Yugoloth
options.summary: Summon a Yugoloth Fiendish Spirit whose attack deals Poison damage and that has damage resistances.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Fiendish Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

modeChoice.notes: The form choice selects the Fiendish Spirit's damage type and rider.

description: You call forth a fiendish spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the Fiendish Spirit stat block. When you cast the spell, choose Demon, Devil, or Yugoloth. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block. The Fiendish Spirit's Hit Points and attack damage increase as the spell's level increases.
